caveats: Bilt/iPrefer monitoring item: verify the I Prefer transfer-partner 1:2 ratio and eligibility before updating transfer-partner UX or point valuation.
transfer_partner_notes: I Prefer should be treated as a monitored transfer partner; confirm current ratio on Bilt before applying.

open_questions: Confirm Bilt → I Prefer transfer ratio and any tier/card restrictions before applying.
Resolved: Bilt newsroom confirms I Prefer as 24th travel partner at 1:2 ratio, launched 2026-06-22. Update transfer-partner UX after schema location is identified.

community.summary: Resolved: Bilt officially added I Prefer Hotel Rewards as a transfer partner at 1:2 ratio. This is update-ready once transfer-partner UX/schema is located.

observations.excerpt: Bilt page should confirm I Prefer as transfer partner and current ratio.
